transcript.text:
(Why is Tzuyang yawning so much...?)
It's 7 AM in the morning
I got here in 7 AM to eat
(The appearance speaks for itself...)
(The best you can get, traditional Korean meal!) Wow, I'm having such a grand breakfast!
(It's a real hole in the wall... So I piratically stayed up all night to visit...)
You can't eat all that food!
Hahahaha
How can you eat all that!!
It's morning, so I'll quickly finish this simple meal!
(No matter how sleepy I am...)
(I, Tzuyang, can't give up my meal...)
(Okay, let's see how much you can eat)
(The morning sun rises)
(Everybody here are starting their day a little earlier)
(The first permanently open market in Korea, Gwangjang Market)

Hello, everyone
Today, I'm at the corner of Gwangjang Market
(Why can't you open your eyes...?) Right now...
It's 7 AM in the morning
(Gave up sleeping to eat...) I only slept for three or four hours
I heard that there is
a hidden hole in the wall right here!
In the past,
(Cheongryangni 'Gwangju Restaurant') I visited 'Gwangju Restaurant' at 6 AM and had a delicious meal
(Missed the home meal flavor) I was reminded of that food, so I came back
(It closes around 3 and 4 PM!) I heard they close early, about 3 PM,
so I came here early in purpose while nobody's around
It's in this street
(True hole in the wall) It's hidden here, a street you'll never expect to have a restaurant
(Enter) Let's go in
(Walking straight into the alleyway)

(Somebody recognized Tzuyang!) Aren't you Tzuyang?
Hello!
You're working hard early in the morning
Yes, I'm here to have some breakfast
(Located in Jongno-gu, Seoul)
('Seung-wu's Restaurant')
Wow, it's so amazing
(It's clear this place is old, a sign of a good restaurant) It's like a typical traditional Korean restaurant
(Scanning the menu!) They mostly have jjigae stew
(Simple menu of the street restaurant) Cabbage leaf, soybean paste, fermented soybean paste, soft tofu, and kimchi jjigae
It's not on the menu, but they also sell stir-fried pork and stir-fried squid!
Ma'am, may I order some food!?
What do you want?
I want a cabbage leaf jjigae,
fermented soybean paste jjigae,
soft tofu jjigae,

stir-fried squid, and stir-fried pork
You can't eat that much food...
Just make her the food
(Got it) Okay
- I want just two bowls of pot rice - Alright
The owner here is very nice,
(She isn't photogenic...) but she doesn't like getting filmed
(Thank you for still allowing us to film!) We did get permission before visiting...
There aren't that many customers in the morning
(The restaurant will soon be packed...!) They'll soon rush in,
(Who you calling simple?) so I'll quickly finish this simple meal!
(Her expectation will be satisfied...) I'm so excited!
(with the traditional Korean food)
(sold for over 30 years in Gwangjang Market advertised by word-of-mouth)
(I didn't order a rolled omelette...)
(Don't be surprised, it's a side dish...)

(The side dishes are even tastier)
(as they are made on the spot)
(Stir-fried squid)
(Stir-fried pork)
(Welcome) Wow, that looks tasty!
(Guys, this full meal only costs 8,000 won...) No way!
Thank you!
You can't eat all that alone...
(Show me if you can)
(Even the stir-fried pork is out!) Wow! Thank you
She's gonna eat that all by herself
(Pot rice for two)
Wow, look at that! The scorched rice looks amazing!
(At the bottom of the pot, we have scorched rice...!) Wow! That's all scorched rice
(Scoop out the rice, pour hot water, and wait!) Scoop out the rice?
(Scoop out the rice, pour hot water, and wait!) We're going to pour this!

Thank you!
(Let's pour the hot water!)
(Perfect!) Done!
Oh, before I start eating,
(It's a bit hard to eat greens yet...) I can't eat this and this
(Returning the side dishes) I can't eat these two dishes
- You can't? - Nope
(Heheh) I don't like vegetables...
(You rascal)
But you aren't that fat!
She only eats meat?
That's what she said
Bon appétit!
Wow, I'm having such a grand breakfast!
The cabbage leaf jjigae is famous here, so I'll try it first
Oh, it's so good!

It's like...
(That's how nice and rustic it is...!) It's like I'm at the countryside!
It's the real deal
(Summoning old man Tzuyang) Wow, the broth is so good
The cabbage leaves are so refreshing
Oh!
By the way, the side dishes
(How is this for one person...?) You could fill containers with them
(Didn't skimp on the ingredients) The fermented soybean paste jjigae is amazing!
It's authentic!
Ah, I love it!
(It's almost like a full-course meal) This meal is so generous
(Side dishes made with care!) They make the side dishes all by themselves at 3 AM
It's so soft and tasty...!
It's really delicious!
The cabbage leaves are so tender!

I usually have to cut the cabbage leaves because they're so tough
Ma'am, it's so delicious!
What's delicious!
The cabbage leaves!!
(Humph, you don't even like vegetables) Look at you! You don't even like kimchi and veggies
(This is Korean style nagging...) Kids these days won't eat their greens
It's so good!
It totally awakened me so early!
(She was just yawning in front of the camera...) Just before, I was so sleepy
(Next) The stir-fried pork!
(There's so much food, it's like it's two portions...) Wow, look at how much food I got!
Ma'am, this is like two portions...
(It was never simple in the first place) This isn't a simple breakfast at all
(Insane flavor...) Wow, the handmade food!
It's so tasty!
(The rolled omelette looks delicious) Doesn't it look delicious?

(Everything's good here) Even the rolled omelette is tasty
I'm a bit surprised
It's like three times tastier than my expectations
Stir-fried anchovies
(Making her go 'WOW'...!) Wow
(Also giving the soft tofu jjigae a taste!)
(The stir-fried squid rivals the stir-fried pork with how much food there is) Stir-fried squid! Wow!f
There's especially more food here
Personally, the stir-fried pork
and the cabbage leaf jjigae
is the best!
It's so tasty!
8,000 won? Everything's 8,000 won
(The jjigae are all 8,000 won, the stir-fried dishes are 12,000 won!)
(Cleaning mode)
(1 bowl of pot rice CLEAR!)

(This is... heaven...)
Seasoned eggplants
The fermented soybean paste jjigae is authentically made
(Naturally entering the kitchen)
(Who is the mystery figure?) It's the owner!
Hello!
(Hello, but...)
How can you eat all that alone?
The owner is so good at cooking
(1 million hearts to the owner...!) Everything is delicious here
(It's so delicious... she's inhaling the soft tofu jjigae...)
(Delivering food the old-fashioned way)
(You're not sleeping as you eat, are you...?)
(Drink the stew straight from the pot...)
(Soft tofu jjigae CLEAR!)
I visited 'Gwangju Restaurant' when it was winter

(The sky was dark as it was a winter morning) I came out at morning, and the sky was black
And now, it's already bright at 7 AM
(Placing a bunch of squid on top of the rice...!) Squid an rice!
(It's amazing how she can only pick out the squid...)
(+ Stir-fried squid sauce)
(Mix it well with the white rice!)
Wow, by the way,
this is the first time I had breakfast so early
ever since I visited 'Gwangju Restaurant'
When I eat breakfast,
(She gets more sleepy after eating...) I get sleepy
(The stir-fried pork is perfect with rice) The pork is a little bit salty,
but the stir-fried squid
isn't that seasoned, and it's very savory
I can just eat it on its own!
(Eye Catch) Perfect!

(Wait a minute, I have to chew the food)
(Stir-fried pork) This is tasty when you have the first bite,
(Stir-fried squid) And this gets tastier the more you eat it
I just like both of them...!
(You look nice, and you also eat well) You look so pretty
Thank you!
(It's because the food is so good...!) It's so delicious!
(It's because the food is so good...!) Is it?
- I really mean it! - Okay
(They're both amazed at each other...)
(+ Rolled omelette)
(+ Rolled omelette)
(+ Seasoned eggplants)
I did my best to finish the side dishes,
(Why won't you go away...?) But they won!t go away
I only ordered a couple of food

to have a simple breakfast,
but it's like how I usually eat
There's so much food
(Picking out every single stir-fried squid!)
(And mixing it with rice again...)
(Second bowl of pot rice CLEAR!)
(Lastly, it's time for the long-awaited scorched rice...)
Ah, because I had to film the insert shot...
It's burnt
The rice at the bottom is burnt, so I'll only scrape the top layer
(Aww) I was waiting for it
(We can have the scorched rice next time) How bad!
(Tzuyang's cabbage leaf eating TIP!) Here's how I eat cabbage leaves
You tear 'em up good
(Kids, what she meant was cut it thinly)
(If you cut cabbage leaves with kitchen shears, you can eat them easier!)

(Last spurt!!)
('Seung-wu's Restaurant' ALL CLEAR!) Ah, that was delicious!
The side dishes were all tasty,
(The first day Tzuyang's stomach lost...) but she have me so much food, so I couldn't finish them
I couldn't finish the side dishes
(It's so tasty, how bad...) Well, we can't help it...
But I really enjoyed the meal!
How aren't you getting fat?
You must have to eat so much since you're filming
(I always eat like this, even when I don't film...) Let me help you...
(Moving away with style) Thank you! That must be heavy
(You really ate all that food...?)
(Yet again... we surprised the owner...!)
I had another great meal!
